posts.text: ITC share price targets: Stock hits 52-week low for fourth day, time to sell or buy?

posts.author: sandeep_cs
posts.text: ITC limited dividend. — I don’t think its a broker specific , the reason I can think of like Upper circuit Option / Future seller - When they dont have required shares and when the position turned to delivery instead of cash settled then exchange may conduct an auction Delivery percentage is more than average - +ve Corp action like Bonus , split , Dividend , Buyback , demerger Expecting bearish movement but upward movement happened , stop loss not triggered due to sudden movement - Due to sudden change is market condition or stock specific +ve news Day traders not able to close the position du…

posts.author: S_Kumar3
posts.text: ITC limited dividend. — Can we say it only happens from brokers who doesn’t square of intraday positions like Zerodha does at 3:25 ? Or is there any other possible reason for short delivery ?

posts.author: Mahesh6
posts.text: ITC limited dividend. — Short delivery happens in liquid shares also. I myself didn’t get normal timely delivery of Britannia and some other liquid shares bought through zerodha. For an individual it happens rarely but if u consider all the buyers it is a frequent phenomenon. My transactions are mostly in Zerodha though I have trading account with another broker also.
